title: Italian Frittata
description: A classic Italian dish made with eggs, cheese, and vegetables, perfect for breakfast or brunch.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the crispy bacon over medium heat until crispy.
Add the minced garlicky to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced dutch to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and egg yolks.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked vegetables in the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet.
Slide the frittata onto a plate and serve hot.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve with your favorite toppings.
